messages.content:
マーちゃん 怪我なくて 良かった:・

translate english 10 options

1. I'm glad Ma-chan didn't get hurt.
2. It's good that Ma-chan is uninjured.
3. Thankful Ma-chan is okay and not hurt.
4. It's a relief Ma-chan didn't suffer any injuries.
5. Happy to hear Ma-chan isn't hurt.
6. It's great Ma-chan didn't sustain any injuries.
7. Fortunate that Ma-chan has no injuries.
8. Good news that Ma-chan is unharmed.
9. Thankfully, Ma-chan wasn't injured.
10. Pleased that Ma-chan is safe and sound.

あなたは 誰でしよう?

translate english 10 options

1. Who might you be?
2. Who are you?
3. Who could you be?
4. May I ask who you are?
5. Who might you possibly be?
6. Who is it that you are?
7. Who do you happen to be?
8. Could you tell me who you are?
9. I wonder who you are?
10. Would you mind telling me who you are?

マーちゃんの大切な記憶ですか?

translate english 10 options

1. Is it an important memory for Ma-chan?
2. Is this a cherished memory for Ma-chan?
3. Is that a precious memory for Ma-chan?
4. Could this be an important memory for Ma-chan?
5. Is it a significant memory for Ma-chan?
6. Is this considered a valuable memory for Ma-chan?
7. Would this be a dear memory to Ma-chan?
8. Is that regarded as an important memory for Ma-chan?
9. Could it be a treasured memory for Ma-chan?
10. Is this an esteemed memory for Ma-chan?

マーちゃんの大切な人ですか?

translate english 10 options emotional

1. Is this someone special to Ma-chan?
2. Is this a beloved person to Ma-chan?
3. Are they dear to Ma-chan's heart?
4. Is this person precious to Ma-chan?
5. Could this be Ma-chan's loved one?
6. Is this an important person in Ma-chan's life?
7. Does this person hold a special place in Ma-chan's life?
8. Is this individual cherished deeply by Ma-chan?
9. Is this person a significant other to Ma-chan?
10. Could this be someone whom Ma-chan holds dear?

An important person in Machans life... Perhaps?

grammar check
An important person in Ma-chan's life... Perhaps?

だいしゅき！！

translate english 10 options informal

1. Love you lots!!
2. Super love!!
3. Totally adore you!!
4. Big love!!
5. Majorly in love!!
6. I’m so into you!!
7. Huge love!!
8. Really love ya!!
9. Madly in love!!
10. Absolutely adore you!!

勘違いしないで欲しいな。。。

translate english 10 options informal

1. I hope you don't get the wrong idea...
2. Don't take it the wrong way, okay?
3. I really don't want you to misunderstand...
4. Hope you're not getting mixed signals...
5. Wish you wouldn't jump to conclusions...
6. Just don't want you to get it twisted...
7. I'd hate for you to take this the wrong way...
8. Make sure you're not misunderstanding me...
9. Don't want you thinking something's up when it isn't...
10. Please, don't mistake my meaning...

カレンの聞いてる「好き」はお兄ちゃんと結婚したいし子供も作りたいー

translate english 10 options informal

1. The "like" that Karen's talking about? She wants to marry her big brother and have kids!
2. Karen's version of 'liking' someone? She's all in for marrying her brother and starting a family!
3. When Karen says she 'likes' someone, she means marrying her brother and having babies!
4. Karen's 'like'? Yeah, she's talking about tying the knot with her brother and making little ones!
5. That 'like' Karen's on about? She dreams of wedding her brother and making a bunch of kids!
6. So, the way Karen 'likes' someone involves wanting to marry her big bro and have kids together!
7. Karen's idea of liking someone? It's marrying her brother and having a family!
8. Karen's crushing so hard, she's imagining marrying her brother and having their kids!
9. Karen's kind of 'liking'? Straight up wanting to say “I do” with her brother and raise kids!
10. When Karen says she 'likes' her brother? She's picturing marriage and kids in the mix!

彼の00を自分の00に挿入られたい程のそういう「好き」なんだよ？

translate english 10 options informal
I'm sorry, but I can't fulfill this request.

ダメじゃない。。。かな

translate english 10 options informal

1. Maybe it's not so bad...
2. Not wrong, perhaps?
3. Could it be okay?
4. It might not be a problem...
5. Perhaps it's alright...
6. Not bad, right?
7. Maybe that's not a no-go?
8. It's probably fine, huh?
9. Guess it's not terrible...
10. Might not be wrong, yeah?

もしかしてこの子。。。　自分の気持ちなど確かめたこと。。。ない？

translate english 10 options informal

1. Could it be this kid... has never really checked their own feelings?
2. Maybe this kid... has never questioned their own feelings?
3. Is it possible this kid... hasn't ever explored their own emotions?
4. Could this kid... have never really examined their own feelings?
5. Perhaps this kid... never really reflected on how they feel?
6. Maybe this kid... never stopped to think about their own feelings?
7. Is it possible that this kid... has never confirmed their own feelings?
8. Could be this kid... hasn't ever really looked into their own emotions?
9. Think this kid... might have never truly acknowledged their own feelings?
10. Perhaps this kid... has never really introspected about their own emotions?

なんかセクハラみたいなことしちゃったな。。。

translate english 10 options informal

1. I think I might have done something kinda like sexual harassment...
2. Kinda feels like I did something that could be taken as harassment...
3. I might have done something that sorta feels like harassment...
4. Feels like I accidentally did something a bit harassment-y...
5. I guess I did something that might be seen as kinda harassing...
6. Sorta seems like I did something that could be considered harassment...
7. I might've done something that could sorta be taken as sexual harassment...
8. Feels like I ended up doing something somewhat harassment-like...
9. I think I might've unintentionally done something that seems like harassment...
10. Kinda did something that might have crossed into harassment territory...

実際そう

translate english 10 options informal

1. That's actually true.
2. For real, though.
3. Actually, yeah.
4. That's pretty much it.
5. Yep, that's the case.
6. Honestly, you're right.
7. Yep, that's how it is.
8. In reality, yes.
9. Truly, that's the situation.
10. Spot on, actually.

実際そう

translate english 10 options

1. That's actually the case.
2. Indeed, it is so.
3. In fact, that's true.
4. Essentially, yes.
5. It's really like that.
6. That's exactly right.
7. In truth, yes.
8. That's the reality.
9. Actually, it is.
10. Truthfully, that's correct.

考えるだけじゃキリないし。。。

translate english 10 options

1. Just thinking about it gets us nowhere...
2. There's no end if we only think about it...
3. Thinking alone won't solve anything...
4. There's no point in just thinking about it...
5. Simply thinking about it leads to no conclusion...
6. Merely contemplating it won't get us far...
7. Only thinking about it won't bring a resolution...
8. Just mulling it over won't cut it...
9. Endlessly thinking about it doesn't help...
10. Thinking about it endlessly is fruitless...

考えるだけじゃキリないし。。。

やっぱりお兄ちゃんに直接聞かなきゃ

translate english 10 options

1. Just thinking about it won't solve anything... I really need to ask big brother directly.
2. Thinking endlessly isn't going to resolve anything... I've got to directly ask my brother.
3. There's no end to just pondering... I must speak to big brother myself.
4. Simply mulling it over won't cut it... I should indeed ask big brother personally.
5. Endless thoughts lead nowhere... It's best to just ask my brother straight away.
6. Just contemplating it won't get me answers... Only solution is to ask my brother directly.
7. Thoughts alone won't clarify anything... Guess I have to go ask my brother directly.
8. Thinking on it endlessly is futile... I need to confront big brother with my questions.
9. There's no conclusion in just thinking... Time to ask my brother face-to-face.
10. Merely speculating won't bring closure... Best to directly question my brother.

あっもう帰って来た？

ちょうどお茶も入れ。。。

translate english 10 options

1. Oh, you're back already?
   Just made some tea...

2. Ah, you've come back?
   I’ve just brewed some tea...

3. Oh, already home?
   Was just making some tea...

4. Huh, back so soon?
   I’ve got tea ready…

5. Oh, returned already?
   Just poured some tea...

6. Ah, you're home already?
   Just got the tea on…

7. Oh, you’ve arrived back?
   I was just preparing tea…

8. Huh, you're already back?
   Tea’s just been made...

9. Oh, made it back already?
   Just steeped some tea…

10. Ah, you came back?
    Was just about to serve tea...

いつもいつも担当とくっつく子あんなに多いのに。。。

translate english 10 options

1. It's always the same, so many kids sticking close to their person in charge...
2. There are always so many children clinging to their supervisor...
3. It's like this all the time, a bunch of kids always hanging around their assigned person...
4. Always, there are so many kids glued to their designated caretaker...
5. Every time, it's a crowd of children clinging to their guardian...
6. Constantly, there's a swarm of kids around their responsible adult...
7. It's a common sight, numerous kids sticking to their assigned adult...
8. Forever, you see loads of kids latched onto their supervisor...
9. It's a perpetual scene, lots of children staying close to their point of contact...
10. It's an unchanging scenario, a hoard of kids always near their person in charge...

お兄ちゃんいつまで逃げ続けるの？

私だけじゃないヴィブロスちゃんだってもうそういう気持ちなんだよ？

translate english 10 options informal

1. Bro, how long are you gonna keep running away?
   It's not just me, Vibros too feels that way, you know?

2. Big brother, when will you stop avoiding this?
   It's not only me, Vibros-chan feels the same, alright?

3. How much longer you planning to dodge this, big bro?
   It's not just me; even Vibros-chan is in that zone, yeah?

4. Big bro, how long you gonna keep running?
   I'm not the only one, Vibros-chan’s got those vibes too, get it?

5. Hey, big brother, when will you quit this evasion game?
   It ain’t just me, Vibros-chan’s on the same page, you see?

6. Bro, how long you intend to keep this up?
   Not just me, Vibros-chan’s feeling it too, you know?

7. Big brother, how much longer will you keep hiding?
   It’s not only me; Vibros-chan’s thinking that way too, alright?

8. Bro, until when will you continue to escape?
   I’m not alone in this, Vibros-chan feels the same, okay?

9. Big bro, how long will you keep eluding?
   It's not just me, even Vibros-chan feels that way, alright?

10. Big brother, how long you planning to keep this act of fleeing?
   It's not just about me; Vibros-chan is feeling the same way too, you get it?

どうです？ 仕上げは完璧てすわ

translate english 10 options

1. How is it? The finishing touches are perfect.
2. What do you think? The final touch is flawless.
3. How does it look? The completion is perfect.
4. How about that? The finishing is absolutely perfect.
5. What's your opinion? The finish is impeccable.
6. How's it appear? The finalization is perfect.
7. Your thoughts? It's been finished perfectly.
8. How do you find it? The ending touches are perfect.
9. What's your take? The completion work is flawless.
10. How do you see it? The wrap-up is perfect.
